productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Impetus II White Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Designed for absolute comfort, the nike Air Impetus II is an absolutely stylish running shoe for those looking for a comfortable and versatile ride. It's stylish look doubles it up as a great lifestyle footwear. Product Details White shoe with mesh upper, synthetic overlays, asymmetric lace-ups and Nike swooshes on side panels in synthetic and embroidered outline TPU midfoot saddle for lightweight support and comfort Cushioned sockliner with meshed and padded tongue and inner Phylon midsole with Natural Motion Engineering technology to offer an optimal ride Rubber outsole with waffle pattern on the forefoot, Nike Air hollow in the heel, shank connecting forefoot and backfoot and forefoot outsole embedded onto upper as a toe guard to enhance durability and protect the toes Material and Care Synthetic, mesh Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
